name: Grilled Spring Onions and Asparagus with Lime
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the spring onions with olive or sunflower oil and grill, turning occasionally, until they are browned on all sides.
2. Brush the asparagus spears with the remaining oil and grill, turning occasionally, until tender and browned on all sides.
3. Serve immediately with wedges of lime and a sprinkle of coarse sea salt.
